question: Will SpaceX complete a Starship integrated test flight reaching orbital insertion by June 14, 2026?
reason: SpaceX's recent Starship V3 test flight achieved partial orbit, indicating progress toward full orbital insertion.
evidence: On May 22, 2026, SpaceX launched its upgraded Starship V3, marking the 12th test flight of the Starship program. ([apnews.com](https://apnews.com/article/53eb1c43f870561788839b08c401bf8f?utm_source=openai))

The Starship upper stage reached space and deployed 22 payloads, including two operational Starlink satellites, before splashing down in the Indian Ocean. ([space.com](https://www.space.com/space-exploration/launches-spacecraft/spacex-starship-v3-megarocket-first-test-flight?utm_source=openai))

Despite some technical issues, such as a Raptor engine shutdown and a missed boost-back by the Super Heavy booster, the test met most mission goals. ([space.com](https://www.space.com/space-exploration/launches-spacecraft/spacex-starship-v3-megarocket-first-test-flight?utm_source=openai))
